info.title: Union Bank API
info.description:
REST API for the Union Bank Management System.

**API Versions**
- `/api/v1/` — Legacy endpoints (bare response models, backward compatible)
- `/api/v2/` — Current endpoints with standardised `ApiResponse[T]` envelope

All endpoints return JSON. Authentication uses Bearer JWT tokens.
Use `/docs` for interactive API documentation.

post.description:
Authenticate a customer and return a JWT access + refresh token pair.

Tokens are set as httpOnly cookies (primary) and returned in the
response body (backward compatibility).
Register a new customer account.

Authenticate as admin and return a JWT access + refresh token pair.

Tokens are set as httpOnly cookies (primary) and returned in the
response body (backward compatibility).

Exchange a refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.

Accepts the refresh token from either:
1. The request body (backward compatibility)
2. The ub_refresh_token httpOnly cookie (new cookie-based flow)

The previous refresh token is revoked (rotation) so it cannot be reused.

get.description: Get the authenticated customer's profile details.

put.description: Update the authenticated customer's profile details.

post.description: Change the authenticated customer's password.
Close the authenticated customer's account.

get.description: Get the current account balance.

post.description: Deposit money into the authenticated customer's account.
Withdraw money from the authenticated customer's account.
Transfer funds to another account.

get.description: Get the full transaction statement (newest first).
Get the last 5 transactions (mini statement).

Get paginated statement using keyset (cursor-based) pagination.

More efficient than offset-based pagination on large datasets.
Include the `cursor` value from the previous page's meta to get the next page.
Download transaction history as a CSV file.
List all savings goals for the authenticated customer.

post.description: Create a new savings goal.
Contribute money from your balance to a savings goal.

delete.description: Delete a savings goal and refund the amount to your balance.

get.description: List all loans for the authenticated customer.

post.description: Apply for a new loan.

get.description: Get details of a specific loan.

post.description: Pay the monthly EMI for a loan.
Calculate EMI preview without applying for a loan.

get.description: View all loan applications with statistics (admin only).
View all pending loan applications (admin only).

post.description: Approve a pending loan application and disburse funds (admin only).
Reject a pending loan application (admin only).

get.description: View all loan applications (admin only).

View all registered accounts with pagination (admin only).

Returns X-Total-Count header for pagination-aware UIs.
Search accounts by account number or name (admin only).

post.description:
Natural-language transaction search.

Accepts plain English queries like:
  - "show me large deposits last month"
  - "what did I spend on food this month?"
  - "find suspicious transactions"
  - "show all deposits over 500"

Translates the query into structured filters using pattern matching,
executes the search, and returns formatted results.
No external API calls — translation is deterministic and local.

get.description: Health check endpoint.

post.description:
Authenticate a customer and return a JWT access + refresh token pair.

Tokens are set as httpOnly cookies (Secure, SameSite=Strict) and also
returned in the response body for backward compatibility with Bearer
token clients.
Register a new customer account.

Authenticate as admin and return a JWT access + refresh token pair.

Tokens are set as httpOnly cookies (Secure, SameSite=Strict) and also
returned in the response body for backward compatibility.

get.description: View bank-wide statistics (admin only).

View all transactions, optionally filtered by account (admin only).

Returns a flat array (not grouped by account) for easier client-side processing.
Use the `account_number` field to group on the client side.
Paginated via offset-based pagination.

schema.title: Response Admin View Transactions Api Admin Transactions Get

post.description:
Exchange a refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.

Accepts the refresh token from either:
1. The request body (backward compatibility with Bearer token clients)
2. The ub_refresh_token httpOnly cookie (new cookie-based flow)

The previous refresh token is revoked (rotation) so it cannot be reused.

get.description: Check if 2FA is enabled for the current admin.
Generate a new TOTP secret and provisioning URI for the admin user.

post.description: Verify a TOTP code to enable 2FA for the admin account.
Disable 2FA for the admin account (requires current TOTP code).

get.description: Health check endpoint.
Kubernetes liveness probe — returns 200 if the process is alive.
Kubernetes readiness probe — checks database connectivity.
Prometheus metrics endpoint. Scraped by Prometheus or any metrics collector.
